name: USA Today
signal: UK Fintech sector warned to adopt Agentic AI against escalating fraud risks.
brief: This headline serves as a critical alert to the UK Fintech sector about the urgent need to adopt Agentic AI to combat rising fraud. Product Managers in financial services should prioritize developing and integrating AI-powered fraud detection and prevention tools to safeguard users and maintain trust.
